# format

**Instance Property**

The format of the audio stream data.

## Declaration

```swift
var format: AVAudioFormat { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNodeDefinition/init(mixerDefinition:format:)] argument.

## Inspecting Stream Properties

- **mixer**: The audio stream’s output pipeline.
